messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-505 — Pipeline board grid layout for a phone: show ticket numbers only (drop BL-/GH- prefix), shorten the grid slug to 2 kebab words, trim the below-grid list lines to the kebab slug only, and move the not-started (NS) column to first
What it solves: The Telegram Pipeline Board's <pre> grid plus its PARKED/AWAITING/ROOT INTAKE/RECENTLY CLOSED
list lines are too wide to fit the human's phone without horizontal scroll. The human asked:
"Only keep the digit of the ticket and/or shorten even more the kebab case slug." Two levers,
both confirmed wit…
Approval context: Draining the human's own root-intake ask (backlog/INTAKE-pipeline-board-grid-too-wide.md). What needs your sign-off is the exact width contract in the feature file: (a) the grid TICKET column shows the ticket NUMBER only, dropping the "BL-"/"GH-" prefix (safe today - zero GH- ids exist; a non-ticke…
BL-505 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-505" (or "reject BL-505 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
